parameters.content:
# E-commerce Post-Delivery — Full Orchestrator

Two phases in one workflow:

**Phase 1 — Upper Section (Create & Send)**
Delivery webhook fires → Wait 2 hours → Formfex AI generates a product-specific review form (creates it automatically) → Form published → Form registered for monitoring → Email sent to customer

**Phase 2 — Lower Section (Monitor & Analyze)**
Formfex Webhook Trigger fires on each new review → Response count checked → At 50+ reviews: full AI product analysis → Slack → Under 50: AI one-sentence summary → Push to store API

**Connection:** Phase 1 creates and registers the review form, Phase 2 monitors it via webhook

## Phase 1 — Create & Send Review Request

Triggered when a delivery is confirmed.
Waits 2 hours, then Formfex AI generates AND creates a product-specific review form.
Form is published, registered for webhook monitoring, and emailed to the customer.

## Phase 2 — Monitor & Analyze Reviews

Formfex Webhook Trigger fires on every new review — formId comes from the webhook payload.

**Track A (50+ reviews):** Full AI product analysis → Slack
**Track B (under 50):** AI one-sentence summary → Push to store API

parameters.title: =Review: {{ $('Delivery Confirmed Webhook').item.json.body.productName }}

parameters.subject: =How's your {{ $('Delivery Confirmed Webhook').item.json.body.productName }}? Leave a quick review!
parameters.html:
=

Hey {{ $('Delivery Confirmed Webhook').item.json.body.customerName }}!

Your {{ $('Delivery Confirmed Webhook').item.json.body.productName }} was delivered. How is it?

Help fellow shoppers by sharing your honest review:

Write Your Review

Takes less than 2 minutes. Your review makes a difference!

parameters.message: Analyze all product reviews: average star rating, top 3 praised aspects with %, top 3 complaints with %, recommendation rate, best positive quote, most constructive criticism, would-buy-again %. Format as a product team briefing.
Look at the most recent review only. Give me a one-sentence summary and the star rating. Format: "[RATING] stars — [summary]"
